---
title: "proxy.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/proxy.ts"
loc: 68
complexity: 6
logic_score: 6.10
style_score: 6.95
intel_score: 8.47
overall_score: 7.17
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 7.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)

## ⛩️ API Gateways
- `[GET] /api/config`


## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fastify)
- [*](file://@fastify/static)
- [*](file://@fastify/cors)
- [WebSocketServer](file://ws)
- [WebSocket](file://ws)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.js)
- [activePersona](file://../personaRegistry.js)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [*](file://node:crypto)

### Exports
- `startProxy`
- `startProxy`
- `server`
- `statsDir`
- `token`
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `distDir`
- `queryToken`
- `authHeader`
- `wss`
- `clients`
- `signalFile`
- `signal`
- `message`
- `url`
